member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IContext
member.summary: Defines a contract for accessing contextual information, properties, and arguments within an application environment.
member.remarks: Implementations of this interface provide access to context-specific data, such as named properties and application arguments. The interface supports resetting the context asynchronously, which may be useful for scenarios requiring state re-initialization. Members are thread-safe only if implemented as such by the concrete type.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IContext.Name
member.summary: Gets the name associated with the current instance.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IContext.Properties
member.summary: Gets/sets properties to be contained within the context.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IContext.Arguments
member.summary: The optional arguments supplied to the application.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItem.Ordinal
member.summary: Specifies the order in which the specified step is executed in a given work flow.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItem.Name
member.summary: A unique name for the specified step usually used for display or logging purposes.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItem.Weight
member.summary: Defines the weight applied to this step when showing progress. The default is 1 which makes it "evenly" weighted. A smaller value indicates this step should have less of an impact on the progress *takes less time to complete) while larger numbers have more of an impact (they take more time to complete). These numbers are totally arbitrary and are evaluated in relation to all other weights in the work flow.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItem.AlwaysExecute
member.summary: Indicates that regardless of the result of previous steps, this step should always execute. This is used in linear work flow managers that stop executing when one of the steps fail. A step marked with this attribute usually a "clean-up" step that must execute every time. This property may be ignored by certain work flow managers.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItem.ExecuteStepAsync(Diamond.Core.Workflow.IContext)
member.summary: Performs the work for the specified step.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItemFactory
member.summary: Defines a factory to create/retrieve work flow items.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowItemFactory.GetItemsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: gets all work flow items instances with the given key.
member.param: The key that groups two or more work flow items into a single sequence.
member.returns: A list of work flow items.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowManager
member.summary: Defines a generic work flow manager.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowManager.ServiceKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique key used to identify the service instance.

member.name: P:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowManager.Steps
member.summary: Gets the work flow items in their execution order.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowManager.ExecuteWorkflowAsync(Diamond.Core.Workflow.IContext)
member.param: The current context to be used for this instance of the work flow execution.
member.returns: True if the work flow was successful; false otherwise.

member.name: T:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowManagerFactory
member.summary: Defines a factory that will retrieve the work flow manager for a given work flow.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.Workflow.IWorkflowManagerFactory.GetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the work flow items for a given work flow identified by groupName;
member.param: a name that groups work flow items together.
member.returns: Returns the work flow manager for the specified work flow.
